column1: achillea-millefolium\North America\ It is considered invasive in many parts of North America
column2: including the United States and Canada. It has naturalized in a variety of habitats

column1: achillea-millefolium\Australia\ It is considered invasive in parts of Australia
column2: where it has become established in grasslands

column1: achillea-millefolium\New Zealand\ It is also invasive in New Zealand
column2: where it competes with native plants in grasslands and other open habitats.

column1: achillea-millefolium\South America\ Invasive populations of Achillea millefolium can be found in parts of South America
achillea-millefolium\South Africa\ It has invaded some areas in South Africa
column2: particularly in disturbed habitats and grasslands.

column1: achillea-millefolium\Asia\ It has naturalized in various parts of Asia
column3: where it is considered invasive in some regions.
